name: CH32H417WEU6
description: Generated from the WCH CH32H417 parser pipeline for CH32H417WEU6 QFN68. Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 2-1-1 CH32H417 Pin definitions. CH32H417WEU6 is a CH32H417 MCU in a 68-pin QFN68 package. This generated definition includes 62 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 7 input channels, CAN, 10M Ethernet, 4 I2C buses, 3 op-amps, USB full-speed, 4 SPI buses, and 8 serial ports.
